pre-merge.description: Require human approval before merging PRs to main.
pre-merge.user_prompt: Reviewer + validator are satisfied. Merge to main? [y/N]

pre-deploy.description: Require human approval before any production deploy.
pre-deploy.user_prompt: Pre-flight checks passed. Deploy <function> to production? [y/N]

pre-schema-change.description: Require human approval before any schema migration.
pre-schema-change.user_prompt: Migration dry-run passed. Apply <migration> to production? [y/N]

pre-bulk-job.description: Require human approval before bulk LLM jobs (>100 rows).
